title: Tender Slovakian Brown Rice Noodle Noodles
description: A velvety herb-infused brown rice noodle dish cooked on a tava griddle, perfect for kids and satvik-friendly.
instructions: Prepare the tava griddle over medium heat and lightly oil the surface.
Rinse the brown rice noodles under cold water until no dust remains.
In a medium pot, bring 500ml water to a boil, add the noodles, and simmer for 8 minutes until al dente.
Drain the noodles and set aside.
In the same pot, pour 200ml vegetable broth, bring to a gentle simmer, and scrape the bottom to deglaze.
Stir in the olive oil, parsley, dill, thyme, lemon zest, and salt until fragrant.
Transfer the broth mixture to the heated tava griddle, pouring evenly across the surface.
Add the drained noodles to the griddle, tossing gently to coat them in the herb sauce.
Cook for 4 to 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the noodles are tender and the sauce thickens, then serve hot.
